query:
SELECT oi.id, oi.orderId, oi.productName, oi.quantity, oi.size, oi.addonsTotal, oia.addonName, oia.addonPrice 
FROM order_items oi 
LEFT JOIN order_item_addons oia ON oi.id = oia.orderItemId 
WHERE oi.orderId = (SELECT id FROM orders WHERE orderNumber = '00020')
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT oi.id, oi.orderId, oi.productName, oi.quantity, oi.size, oi.addonsTotal, oia.addonName, oia.addonPrice
